title: ClaimLog
body:
This plugin is an add-on to GriefPrevention that allows for tracking claim history. This includes creating claims, resizing claims, and deleting claims.

**Commands:**
- /claimlog player <player> - checks claim history for a player
- /claimlog claim <claimid> - check claim history for a claim
- /claimlog here - check claim history for the claim you're currently in
- /claimlog reload - reloads the config/lang files

**Permissions:**
- claimlog.command.player
- claimlog.command.claim
- claimlog.command.here
- claimlog.command.reload

**Restrictions:**

This plugin can't work retroactively, meaning it'll only be able to look up details about claims that were created/modified/deleted after the plugin was installed. Also, all data retrieval commands require Paper or a fork at the moment. If using Spigot, it'll only collect the info, but until I either update the plugin to support Spigot more or you switch to Paper, the only way to view the info would be to view the files through your panel.

Let me know of any feedback you have!
